texto: To enjoy and learn from what you read you must understand the meanings of the words a writer uses. You do yourself a grave disservice if you read around words you don’t know, or worse, merely guess at what they mean without bothering to look them up.For me, reading has always been not only a quest for pleasure and enlightenment but also a word-hunting expedition, a lexical safari.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Charles Harrington Elster sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “To enjoy and learn from what you read you must understand the meanings of the words a writer uses…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, literature, reading, útil em momentos de reading e vocabulary.
